name: button-group
title: Button Group
description: Plex UI ButtonGroup — join buttons, inputs, and trigger controls into a single visual unit. Compound API with ButtonGroup.Separator, orientation support, and automatic gap handling for nested sub-groups.

files.content:
export { ButtonGroup } from '@plexui/ui/components/ButtonGroup';
export type { ButtonGroupProps, ButtonGroupOrientation, ButtonGroupSeparatorProps } from '@plexui/ui/components/ButtonGroup';

docs: Import as `import { ButtonGroup } from '@/components/ui/button-group'`. See https://plexui.com/components/button-group for full prop reference.
